news.headline: Anodot wins 2024 EMEA AWS Partner Award for Rising Star Technology, driving innovation for customers worldwide.
news.summary: Anodot, a prominent player in the tech industry, was recently honored with the Rising Star Technology Partner Award in the EMEA region. The award ceremony took place in Las Vegas on December 4, 2024. Anodot was recognized as one of the leading companies globally that assists customers in fostering innovation. This accolade solidifies Anodot's position as an innovative force in the market.

news.headline: New recipe page by F.E.P. features cultural vegan dishes for holidays, Dec 4, 2024, SAN LUIS OBISPO, offers plant-based alternatives.
news.summary: In San Luis Obispo, California, on December 4, 2024, the Food Empowerment Project (F.E.P.), a vegan food justice organization, launched a new webpage featuring a collection of culturally diverse vegan recipes for the holiday season. This online resource provides plant-based versions of traditional dishes, catering to different dietary preferences and encouraging a more sustainable and compassionate approach to cooking. Whether individuals are looking for a meat-free alternative or simply seeking to incorporate more plant-based options into their meals, this page offers a variety of recipes to choose from. Visit the website to explore these flavorful and festive vegan creations.

news.headline: Salesforce stock climbs on solid revenue growth, AI potential, boosting company's prospects.
Outcomes4Me and CURE® Media Group team up to provide cancer patients with access to resources for care.
news.summary: A new partnership has been formed to support cancer patients by giving them access to reliable resources for guidance throughout their treatment journey. Outcomes4Me Inc. has collaborated to offer evidence-based information to patients. This initiative aims to empower individuals with cancer by providing them with essential support. The partnership was announced in Boston on December 4, 2024. This collaboration marks a significant step in offering personalized care to patients, with a focus on ensuring they have access to important resources to aid them in making informed decisions about their health.

news.headline: Shareholders offered buyout at specified price in Unieuro tender offer on December 4, 2024.
Monthly update from Marie Brizard Wine & Spirits on total voting rights and shares.
Poolside and AWS partner to offer generative AI for software engineering on AWS platforms, utilizing AWS Trainium chips.
news.summary: A new service has been introduced to assist customers in seamlessly operating poolside software engineering foundation models within their AWS environment. These models can now be accessed on Amazon Elastic Cloud Compute (EC2, with future availability on Amazon Bedrock. The service harnesses the capabilities of AWS Trainium chips to enhance performance.

news.headline: Coinbase to list Gigachad and Turbo meme coins, leading to immediate price surges for Ethereum and Solana.
news.summary: Coinbase revealed intentions to add Gigachad and Turbo, two meme coins, to their platform. As a result, the prices of both coins surged significantly.

news.headline: New BLOOMAFEST Tremblant music festival in Tremblant on May 9 and 10, 2025. Hosted at the foot of the pedestrian village.
news.summary: Experience BLOOMAFEST Tremblant's inaugural edition on May 9 and 10, 2025, at Mont-Tremblant. The open-air event, held at the base of the pedestrian village, promises an unforgettable experience. Join us for this exciting festival starting...

news.headline: The Institutes' Pete Miller discusses AI in risk management during Travelers Institute webinar, focusing on Predict & Prevent model.
news.summary: Pete Miller from The Institutes in Malvern, Pennsylvania, discussed the impact of the AI-driven Predict & Prevent™ model on the Risk Management and Insurance (RMI) sector. The innovative model is significantly changing the industry landscape by leveraging artificial intelligence technology to enhance risk assessment and mitigation strategies.

ECB's Nagel: No objection to rate cut, but reserving judgment until meeting
Joachim Nagel, President of Bundesbank, speaks in Luxembourg

Nagel of ECB: No significant risk of inflation undershooting

Scientific Games selected as Ohio Lottery's new gaming system partner to drive growth.
news.summary: A technology company has secured a contract to provide an advanced solution for driving growth in Ohio's education programs. Scientific Games, based in Atlanta, revealed on December 4, 2024, that they have been chosen as the provider of the Ohio Lottery's latest lottery gaming system technology. This new system is aimed at supporting the state's educational initiatives and will play a vital role in shaping the future of the Ohio Lottery.

news.headline: Rising inflation jeopardizes forecasted Fed rate cuts. Learn more for crucial insights.
$1.6 million available for NSF tissue engineering research on ISS National Lab in annual solicitation.
news.summary: The latest solicitation is now available for numerous awards to assist in space-based tissue engineering and mechanobiology research at the Kennedy Space Center, Florida. As of December 4, 2024, the U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF) has initiated this funding opportunity for the eighth year in a row. Projects in this field are being sought through the solicitation, with multiple awards anticipated to be granted to support research in these areas.

news.headline: Kings Care Foundation announces holiday events with partners, incl. Children's Hospital LA and Crypto.com in Los Angeles.
news.summary: The holiday events lineup of Kings Care Foundation was revealed in Los Angeles, with the team and partners such as Children’s Hospital Los Angeles and Crypto.com joining in.

news.headline: Batteries Plus wins Franchise Update Media STAR Award for 2024 for Best Franchise Development Website.
news.summary: A renowned battery retailer, Batteries Plus, headquartered in HARTLAND, Wis., received the prestigious Franchise Development Website Award on Dec. 4, 2024. Considered the top consumer and business specialty battery franchise globally, Batteries Plus stood out among competitors to win this recognition. This award showcases their exemplary website, emphasizing their commitment to franchise development.

news.headline: OneRail receives $42M investment from Aliment Capital for growth; focuses on last mile omnichannel fulfillment.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, OneRail, a prominent player in last-mile omnichannel fulfillment solutions, has revealed a significant growth capital investment. This investment, spearheaded by Los Angeles' Aliment Capital, a global investment firm focusing on the food industry, health, nutrition, and supply chain, is aimed at advancing OneRail's software as a service platform, OmniPoint®. The investment will enable the company to enhance its capabilities for dynamic fulfillment.

news.headline: South Korea's President Yoon faces 37% chance of impeachment by 2024; stock market affected, Samsung down 1.12%.
news.summary: South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol is facing political uncertainty, leading to active trading on prediction market Polymarket. The data indicates a 37% chance of Yoon being impeached by the end of 2024, while there is a 29% probability of his removal from office, highlighting the growing instability in the country. This situation has had an impact on South Korea's financial markets, with major tech and industrial stocks like Samsung Electronics (OTC:SSNLF), SK Hynix (OTC:HXSCF), and Hyundai Motor (OTC:HYMTF) experiencing declines of 1.12%, 0.061%, and 0.70% respectively. This turmoil has also spilled over to U.S.-listed South Korean equities, with Posco Holdings (NYSE:PKX) dropping by 4.36% in regular trading.

news.headline: 13th Annual MJBizCon in Las Vegas welcomes thousands of cannabis professionals to largest B2B event; hope for rescheduling and SAFER Banking.
news.summary: Today, MJBizCon, the leading B2B cannabis event globally, commenced at the Las Vegas Convention Center, marking its 13th annual event. This year's gathering is particularly significant following the initial hearing on marijuana rescheduling. Sarah Wilson, the vice president of events & sales at MJBizCon, expressed optimism about the potential for rescheduling and the promising outlook for SAFER Banking. The event serves as a platform for the cannabis industry to unite and explore future opportunities.

news.headline: EQA announces Ozark Steel acquired by Dakota Holdings, strengthening Dakota's steel platform.
news.summary: Eight Quarter Advisors (EQA) recently acted as the exclusive sell-side advisor for Ozark Steel Fabricators, Inc. during its acquisition by Dakota Holdings, LLC. Dakota Holdings, a private investment firm located in Dallas, Texas, is focused on enhancing its portfolio of structural steel fabricators and erectors. The acquisition aligns with Dakota Holding's strategy to bolster its position in the market and support the growth initiatives of its existing entity, Staley Steel based in Dallas. This move sets the stage for potential expansion opportunities for the companies involved in the transaction.

news.headline: Revelyst launches Winter 2024 Gear Guide, highlighting top-tier performance and outdoor innovation. #RevelystGearGuide.
news.summary: The latest gear collection from Revelyst and its associated brands is being highlighted in Providence, Rhode Island. This new line showcases top-tier performance and outdoor innovation, catering to individuals seeking high-quality equipment for their outdoor adventures.

news.headline: Soitec and GlobalFoundries team up to produce High-Performance RF-SOI chips. #tech #partnership
Sodexo will release monthly share capital & voting rights info on Nov 30, 2024. Stay tuned. #finance #updates
Milestone Scientific to present at investor conference on Dec 11, 2024. CEO Arjan Haverhals & Chairman Neal Goldman to attend.
news.summary: In Roseland, New Jersey on December 4, 2024, Milestone Scientific Inc. (NYSE: MLSS) shared news of their CEO Arjan Haverhals and Chairman Neal Goldman participating in The Benchmark Company’s 13th Annual Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference on December 11, 2024. The conference will take place at the New York Athletic Club in New York City. Milestone Scientific Inc. is renowned for developing computerized drug delivery instruments that offer precise and painless injections.

news.headline: AI tops 2025 health tech hazards list: ECRI warns of risks in home-use devices, cybersecurity, and counterfeit products.
news.summary: A recent report from the ECRI identified key health technology risks for the year. These risks include issues related to the home-use of medical devices, cybersecurity vulnerabilities, and counterfeit medical products. The report, released annually, highlights the importance of addressing these concerns in the healthcare industry. Additionally, it mentions the growing presence of artificial intelligence (AI) in healthcare applications. The report serves as a vital resource for staying informed and proactive in managing potential risks.

news.headline: 1-800-STRIPER® launches affordable paved lot maintenance services in Fort Myers & Naples on Nov 4.
news.summary: In Fort Myers and Naples, Florida, a new franchise of 1-800-STRIPER® was launched on November 4, 2024. This franchise aims to provide affordable solutions for restoring commercial and industrial parking lots. This initiative offers business and property owners in the area a cost-effective option for improving their parking spaces.

news.headline: Poseidon invests in two new NJ cannabis dispensaries, aiding their launch in fast-growing market.
news.summary: Poseidon Investment Management, a prominent player in the cannabis industry, has disclosed their involvement in building and launching two new dispensaries in New Jersey. The state's market is rapidly expanding, making it a lucrative hub for cannabis businesses. This move by Poseidon Investment Management signifies their commitment to thriving in this burgeoning market. The firm's announcement came on December 4, 2024, and signals their dedication to capitalizing on the growth opportunities presented by the cannabis sector.

news.headline: RITZ to debut at Big Game in 2025 on Feb. 9. Brand's first appearance at the event. News from East Hanover, N.J.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in East Hanover, New Jersey, RITZ, America's beloved cracker, announced its plans for a significant year in 2025. One of the highlights will be the brand's inaugural appearance during the Big Game on February 9, 2025. This marks a milestone for RITZ as it ventures into the highly anticipated event, showcasing its popular product to a wide audience. This move signifies an exciting development for the brand and sets the stage for a successful year ahead.

news.headline: Furniture Row and Denver Mattress store in Mansfield, Ohio undergo extensive renovations, recently opened on 2039 Walker Lake Rd in Grand Reopening.
news.summary: The Furniture Row and Denver Mattress store in Mansfield, Ohio, situated at 2039 Walker Lake Rd, has recently undergone a significant renovation and is set for its Grand Reopening. The store has been revamped to enhance the shopping experience for customers.

news.headline: Service Express acquires Mid-Range, boosting service portfolio and presence in Canada with the Greater Toronto Area acquisition.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 4, 2024, in GRAND RAPIDS, Mich., Service Express, a prominent data center and infrastructure solutions company, divulged its acquisition of Mid-Range, a managed infrastructure solutions provider situated in the Greater Toronto Area. This strategic acquisition is aimed at fortifying their market presence and offering extended services to customers in the region.

news.headline: Saltbox Mgmt secures investment for B2B growth. Led by Salesforce Ventures, with follow-on from Traction Capital.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Saltbox Mgmt, a prominent player in Salesforce-powered B2B and D2C digital commerce and order management, revealed the completion of its most recent funding round. The funding was primarily spearheaded by Salesforce Ventures along with additional investment from Traction Capital. The specific figures regarding the amount raised were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: Wealthbox selected for enterprise CRM agreement with IFG Advisory, an Atlanta financial services firm for financial advisors.
news.summary: Wealthbox, a leading CRM software for financial advisors, recently announced a significant enterprise CRM agreement with IFG Advisory, a financial services firm based in Atlanta that assists independent financial advisors. The agreement marks a new partnership aimed at enhancing IFG Advisory's services to its network of advisors. This collaboration showcases Wealthbox's position as a top-rated CRM software in the industry, providing essential tools and solutions for financial professionals. The agreement represents a strategic move for both companies and underlines the ongoing efforts to support financial advisors with innovative technology.

news.headline: Trump set to select Faulkender as Deputy Treasury Secretary
Trump to announce deputy Treasury pick soon: sources
Investment firm Altus Capital Partners buys Air Innovations, LLC, a manufacturer of environmental control units, targeting various industries.
news.summary: Altus Capital Partners, a middle-market manufacturing investment firm based in Wilton, Conn., has recently acquired Air Innovations, LLC, a leading manufacturer of environmental control units (ECUs) catering to various industries like wine, aerospace, semiconductor, homeland security, and healthcare. Air Innovations offers customized solutions along with a diverse range of standard products. This acquisition marks a significant move by Altus Capital to strengthen its position in the market.

news.headline: Three Link Solutions is hosting a webinar on deploying Workday’s Launch Now Offering, featuring Prime Time International's HR Director.
news.summary: Dallas-based company Three Link Solutions, specializing in optimizing Workday investments, is hosting a webinar named "Learn How a Small Business Successfully Deployed Workday’s New Launch Now Offering." The event is scheduled for December 11 at 11 a.m. CT. Speakers include Alba Castro, HR Director at Prime Time International, and Anna Patrascu. Interested individuals are encouraged to secure their spots promptly.

news.headline: Laser Photonics Corp presents laser marking systems for manufacturing industry, creating codes and alphanumerics on surfaces.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Laser Photonics Corporation (LPC) presented the impactful uses of its industrial laser marking systems in the manufacturing sector. These systems utilize a low-powered beam that alters the surface without deep penetration, allowing for the creation of linear and 2D codes, UID, and alphanumeric marks. LPC is a prominent global developer of laser systems for cleaning and material processing. This innovative technology is gaining traction within the industry for its precision and efficiency.

news.headline: SurrealDB launches Surreal Cloud - a fully managed database service for developers, solving complexity issues.
news.summary: The tech company SurrealDB has introduced Surreal Cloud, a new Database-as-a-Service (DBaaS) product, in London. This offering provides enterprises with a fully managed solution for developers looking to utilize the capabilities of SurrealDB without having to deal with infrastructure management. Surreal Cloud aims to enhance the database experience, enabling businesses to achieve exceptional levels of scalability and resilience. This launch marks a significant milestone for SurrealDB as it expands its services to cater to the evolving needs of businesses.

news.headline: Clari hires Allison Carroll as Chief Customer Officer in Sunnyvale, California, aiming for revenue predictability and growth.
news.summary: A recent announcement from Clari, a company based in Sunnyvale, California, revealed the appointment of Allison Carroll as their new Chief Customer Officer. In her new role, Carroll will focus on enabling customers to enhance their revenue predictability and drive growth. This strategic move underscores Clari's commitment to delivering exceptional customer experiences.

news.headline: Fellows Fund adds Lilian Weng as Distinguished Fellow for AI advancements. Alex Ren excited about her role.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Fellows Fund, a prominent venture capital firm specializing in AI, has appointed Lilian Weng as a Distinguished Fellow. Weng, known for her significant contributions to AI safety, joins an esteemed group of experts dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence and fostering innovation in various sectors. According to Alex Ren, Founding Partner at Fellows Fund, they are excited to have Weng on board due to her visionary leadership.

news.headline: China presents aggressive trade plan as US industrial leadership declines, gaining leverage against President-elect Trump.
news.summary: As the United States industrial dominance wavers, China has become more assertive in trade negotiations, especially as President-elect Donald Trump gets ready to assume office.

news.headline: Miller Lite partners with Top Rank boxing in most integrated deal ever, to run through 2025. Celebrating true originals.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking collaboration, Miller Lite has teamed up with Top Rank for the most extensive boxing partnership in American history, set to continue until 2025. This innovative alliance, announced on December 4, 2024, underscores both brands' shared dedication to championing authenticity and originality, whether it's within the boxing realm, entertainment industry, or social settings. This integrated partnership is poised to redefine the landscape of boxing sponsorships, showcasing a unique synergy between a legendary premium light beer and a renowned boxing promotion company.

news.headline: USSFCU in Alexandria, VA, wins awards in 2024 for workplace excellence, employee well-being, and organizational thriving.
news.summary: Closing out the year 2024 on a positive note, the United States Senate Federal Credit Union (USSFCU) based in Alexandria, Va., has received several prestigious accolades. These recognitions emphasize the institution's dedication to workplace excellence, employee welfare, and organizational prosperity.
